title: Heavyweight Pattern Cutter
description: We need a master pattern cutter experienced with heavyweight denim, cotton, and technical fabrics. 5+ years in industrial garment construction required.

title: Brand Photographer
description: Seeking a photographer who understands brutalist aesthetics. High-contrast monochrome portfolio required. Must have experience shooting garment details.

title: E-Commerce Developer
description: Build and maintain our e-commerce platform. Experience with Node.js, Express, and Tailwind CSS required. Streetwear enthusiasm a plus.
